name: VibroSense Folded-Cascode OTA
description: Core building block reused by PGA, all 5 BPFs, and envelope detectors. Folded-cascode topology for >60dB gain. All PMOS must stay out of weak inversion (Vgs-Vth > 150mV).
margin_rule: Every spec must pass in all 5 corners and at -40/27/85C

input_noise_nv_sqrthz_1k.description: Input-referred noise at 1kHz (CAVEAT: ngspice noise may differ 2-5x from silicon)

power_uw.description: Total OTA power at 1.8V (Itail x Vdd)
